easy.title: Image Gallery with Captions
easy.description:
Create an HTML page with 6 images arranged in a 3x2 grid, each wrapped in a <figure> with a descriptive <figcaption>. Use CSS grid or flexbox for layout.

Hints: Use CSS grid: grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr), Use a media query at 768px for 2 columns, Each figcaption should describe the image uniquely

Validation: Six figures displayed in responsive grid with proper captions, border styling, and correct breakpoints.
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Image Gallery with Captions</title>
  <style>
    body { font-family: system-ui; padding: 20px; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- TODO: Implement Image Gallery with Captions -->
</body>
</html>

medium.title: Accessible Technical Article
medium.description:
Write a short technical article (300 words) about any topic, including at least 4 figures: one image, one table, one code listing, and one blockquote. All figures must be properly accessible.

Hints: Write the article first, then identify where figures fit naturally, Use <figure id='fig-1'> for cross-referencing, Use aria-labelledby or aria-describedby for complex figures

Validation: Full article with 4 accessible figures, all with captions, alt text, and in-text references.

hard.title: Interactive Data Dashboard with Figure Widgets
hard.description:
Build a data dashboard where each widget (chart, table, stat card) is wrapped in a <figure> with a caption. Users can rearrange widgets via drag and drop.

Hints: Use dragstart, dragover, drop events for drag and drop, Save order as array of IDs in localStorage, Build simple bar charts with CSS: div with height based on data value, Use CSS Grid with grid-column/grid-row for varied widget sizes

Validation: Working dashboard with 6 draggable figure widgets, persistent layout, responsive design, and basic charts.
